title: Enchantment Tree
description: Allows enchantments to be upgraded in a custom menu
body:
This datapack allows a custom menu to be made using an enchantment table and chest that allows enchantments to slowly be upgraded over time, rather than direct enchantments. For example, you can upgrade a Sharpness II enchantment to Sharpness III.

This datapack has a lot of issues, and there is currently an update in the works. Not sure when it will be released, but it is coming. Feel free to ask about the progress in my discord server as needed.

Please credit me if you use this datapack in any sort of public or profitable manner.
